feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Orchestration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Orchestration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Fetch the data between dates using select query in JDBC receiver
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My requirement is REST to JDBC synchronous scenario using select query statement I need to pull data from database and send response back to REST API.

I have gone through the below article 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-pi-proxy-to-jdbc-scenario/ba-p/13326556

I am able to receive the response using the select statement in receiver JDBC. However, I need to select the data in certain period like 10 minutes using specific date field. 

Like if I give 02-07-2024 10:00:00 as input date for Select SQL statement then it should fetch data for next 10 minutes using the same date field which is 

Data between 02-07-2024 10:00:00 to 02-07-2024 10:10:00 

Please help.

entry.title: Download large file using REST adapter in SAP PO 7.5
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have requirement to download a large file ( > 2GB) using REST URL.

The actual message flow is like we need to fetch the file having username/password from AL11 and call the REST URL to download the file(.tar file).

I have tried to use the async - sync config, fetching the file from AL11 and calling the Rest URL and trying to save the downloaded file using File receiver channel(used in File sender channel Module) but the message is getting failed due to large file size.

 

Is it possible to use chunk mode or using unix script?

Kindly suggest how to achieve this requirement using SAP PO. 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Niyati

entry.title: Connect PO7.5 to Integration Suite?
entry.content:
Hi,

At my customer side we currently have multiple interfaces like ECC backend <=> SAP PO <=> 3rd party
Customer will switch part of the operation to S4HANA and also wants to move from SAP PO to Integration Suite on BTP.

But some of 3rd party connections are really quite complicated and might even be changed in 1 to 2 years, so i feel like the effort to move all of that to IS now, and then still change it later on is not worth the effort.

So what i'm thinking about is a split in some interfaces where we start using IS and PO together.
That will look like S4 <=> IS <=> PO <=> 3rd party.

This way i,
1) only connect S4 to IS (and not also to PO)
2) dont have to worry about the complicated stuff that is between PO and 3rd party
3) take up the work of connecting IS to 3rd party when the time has come for that change they will make

Of course it requires me copy all ICO's on PO to not have ECC as sender (mostly idocs by the way) but have Integration Suite as sender.
So that is some extra work.

Any thoughts on this way of working?
Can i just create HTTP connections between PO and IS to accomplish this scenario?

Any comments are appreciated

Kr

Robert

entry.title: How to check the top level work item ID in mass (without accessing the details of the workflow log)
entry.content:
With the solution of KBA 3277360 it is possible to find top level work item ID. But the solution is on single work item basis. 

How to check the top level work item ID in mass (without accessing the details of the workflow log). 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Can we clean up objects SAP PI box in bulk.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have one new dev box created  as the copy of existing DEV box . Now we want to delete the not required integration from the new dev box. Do we have any job or any way that we can bulk delete the objects(iflows etc) rather than deleting one by one.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: SAP PO : Multipart/form-data error when sending attachment through REST receiver adapter
entry.content:
I have a requirement to send a multipart/form-data body payload through REST receiver adapter. This is the POSTMAN HTTP source code that is successfully sent.

 

I have set my REST receiver CC as below.

and have successfully used java mapping to construct the payload in below format.

However, i receiver error in the REST receiver adapter.

Please help me what configuration am i still missing.

entry.title: How to give filename dynamically in file sender channel
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to call the REST API to get the file name in response payload and use that particular filename in file sender channel to poll the file from SFTP server and place it in S4.

Kindly suggest how we can give the file name dynamically.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Niyati

entry.title: IDOC Metadata Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
Im new to SAP PO, need your help with "IDOC_ERROR_METADATA_UNAVAILABLE" issue.
In my case 3 types of IDOC transfers are happening from X system to Y system via SAP PO,
DESADV.DELVRY03, INVOIC.INVOIC01 and ORDRSP.ORDERS05.
Issue only occurs with the ORDRSP.ORDERS05 IDOC, Fails in SM58 with Metadata error.
For all 3 IDOC's same channel is used, tried using different channel but no luck.

I tried uploading the metadata manually but even in IDOC metadata monitor im facing the issue with data mismatch, i.e.
When i upload the metadata with details(sender channel) of system X, once uploaded its displayed as system Y in repository ID. The sender channel of Repository ID X is in Repository ID Y.

When i used receiver channel for the metadata upload it gets uploaded but the sender channel is not available.

entry.title: FCC error - Record type: HEADER missing in the end of the file AK2.csv
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Kindly help me this FCC issues

Getting error:

please help me on this issues.

entry.title: Querying Data From Salesforce to SAP BW/4HANA by SAP PI/PO as middleware ?
entry.content:
Hi there, I am new to SAP PI/PO. I want to know the steps to fetch the data from Salesforce to SAP BW/4HANA by SAP PI/PO as middleware. My case is that I have to pass a SOQL query to salesforce using rest API and the data that will come will need to be captured in SAP PI/PO, where I have to create a configuration such that the data I have to fetch from the API until I don't get all the records, because salesforce has a limitation of 2000 records to fetch at a time. Then we have to use the nextURL key from the response which gives us the URL for the next chunk of rows. until another field which is coming in response called done does not have its value as true. After The Data is gathered I have to send those data to the SAP BW/4HANA where these data will be stored in tables for which I have to do some ABAP developments.

=> In Short I need the detailed steps on how to perform this anyone who has done this earlier and knows the integration stated above will be helpful.

 

Thanks

entry.title: OData adapter is broken and does not work. Please address this issue as soon as possible.
entry.content:
The OData adapter does not seem to be working properly for several days now. Is anyone else experiencing this phenomenon?
I would like to get some help.

When I press step2, I get “Invalid or missing namespace for ‘Schema’.” is displayed.

Best regards

entry.title: Execute SQL statement on SAP PO and then export CSV file
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are working on SAP PO single stack 7.5 and we have extracted message count for SAP PO 7.5 using Message overview. I got to know that there is another way, would allow even better analysis by also considering message size. Could you please help me to know on how to execute SQL statement on SAP PO 7.5 single stack? What level of access is needed to do so? what tools/softwares to be installed to do that? Should we take help from Basis team who has SAP PO server level access?

CREATE TABLE Z_BC_MSG AS (SELECT MSG_ID,DIRECTION,TO_PARTY_NAME,TO_PARTY_TYPE,FROM_PARTY_NAME,FROM_PARTY_TYPE,TO_SERVICE_NAME,TO_SERVICE_TYPE,FROM_SERVICE_NAME,FROM_SERVICE_TYPE,BYTES_LENGTH,RECV_ACTION_NAME,RECV_ACTION_TYPE,SCENARIO_ID FROM BC_MSG)

and then we need to export Z_BC_MSG as CSV file?

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: SAP PO Java Single Stack - need a tutorial for creating an API for getting PO messages payload
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community!

There is a need in my team for creating a monitoring system for SAP PO messages besides SAP default pimon.
In order to do that we want to extract the messages payload with the help of an API.
After an internet research we saw that there is the "Web Services Navigator" tool which consists of different operations such as "getMessageList", "getMessageBytesJavaLangStringBoolean" and a lot others.
It seems that with the help of this tool we get what we are looking for.
Now we want to implement an API (REST API is preferred) that will get us the messages payload.
We would love for a tutorial and detailed explaination of how we can implement this sort of API (REST API is preferred) with the help of the "Web Services Navigator" tool mentioned above, ESR, IB or other useful tools you might know of.

**If there is a way to extract SAP PO messages information and payloads with python language without any other tools - it is our most preferable way 🙂

P.S. We already have of course ESR, IB and SAP PO Java single stack.
We use SAP NetWeaver Process Integration 7.50.

Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: kate AMQP channel in error in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have sender 3rd party Kate AMQP sender channel polling in error in SAP PO like shown below.

Could you please recommend the corrective actions to resolve the issue?

Error code:

no connection to broker check start/stop logs, last known error:error during establishing connection to AMQP server with channel:AMQP_XXXXXX, error :readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class javax.jms.JMSException)readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class javax.jms.JMSException)readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class org.apache.qpid.jms.provider.exceptions.ProviderIOException)readAddress(..) failed: Connection reset by peer (class io.netty.channel.unix.Errors$NativeIoException)| |

Regards

Ramu

entry.title: SAP PO 7.5 Failed to boot after Heap Size increase
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are running PO 7.5 and updated our HEAP size in NWA to 8gb from 4gb. Now the System is not booting. Any BASIS expert who could suggest a solution or note? 

 

***hostname***:sidadm 3> startsap all
Checking db Database
-------------------------------------------
J2EE Database is running
See logfile /home/<sidadm>/JdbcCon.log 
Starting Startup Agent sapstartsrv
FAIL: Timeout
Startup of Instance Service failed

entry.title: Exercises SAP PI PO
entry.content:
hello everyone,

can you tell me where I can find some exercises to do as training, for creating flows on sap pi/po?
thank you

entry.title: SAP PI/PO migration from any-DB (MS SQL server) to HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are planning to migrate from ECC (EHP8) application to S/4 HANA. And we have SAP PI/PO system integrated with ECC. So we are in doubt whether to migrate our SAP PI/PO application from MS SQL Server database to HANA database. As far as I know, unlike ECC or BW, we don't have huge demand for transactions or reports which are usually time-consuming or data-intensive in PI/PO. All PI objects are always in the runtime cache. In production environments, we archive messages frequently. So if we migrate PI/PO database from any DB (MS SQL DB) to HANA DB I don't think it will make much difference. So can anyone please suggest our ideas.

Thanks,

Praveen

entry.title: SAP PI NW7.5 upgrade and split (ctc wizards for PI split)
entry.content:
Hi,

We performed upgrade of SAP dual stack PI NW 7.40 to SAP PI NW 7.5 followed by Split procedure.

We followed upgrade guide, see attached, page 62, 

f the former SAP PI system is a dual-stack implementa­tion, you must carry out after the upgrade of SAP PI to SAP NetWeaver 7.5 the dual-stack-split using the soft­ware provisioning manager for the dual stack-split pro­cedure and the PI Upgrade CTC Wizard for the configu­ration adjustment.

1 - upgrade

2 - split

3 - trying to run PI Upgrade EHP Wizard and it failing.

SAP note DIGITS , see attached, have different sequence: Upgrade, Wizard, Split.

So, 2 documents have different information.

Since Upgrade and split is already done, we are seeking your help on completing PI Upgrade EHP Wizard.

According to the note below, the Wizard cannot be run after split.

Kind regards,

PERSON_NAME.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
